ham.subject: Weekly Marketing Insights – 12th April 2024
ham.body:
Hi team,

Hope you’re doing great! Here’s a quick roundup of what’s happening in our marketing universe this week.

1. New Product Launch: Our latest line of eco‑friendly notebooks is officially live. Check out the details at <URL> and let us know your first impressions.

2. Campaign Performance: The ‘Summer Refresh’ campaign saw a 15% lift in engagement across Instagram and Facebook. Full metrics are available in the shared folder – just a quick click on <URL>.

3. Upcoming Events: Don’t miss the virtual webinar on ‘Digital Trends 2024’ scheduled for 20th April at 3 PM IST. Register now via <URL>.

Feel free to forward this newsletter to your teams and let’s keep the momentum going!

Best regards,
Marketing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: CEO Gift Card Request
spam.body:
Hi everyone,

This is [CEO Name] from the executive office. I need your immediate assistance with a client request that requires a $100 gift card to be processed by the end of the day. 

Please follow the secure portal at <URL> and submit the necessary details. If you hit any issues, contact me directly at <URL>.

Thanks for your quick action on this!

Regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
